name: Contact USA
description_short: Credit repair company claiming 33 years of experience that disputes negative items on credit reports and offers credit monitoring and restoration services.
description_long:
Contact USA positions itself as America's oldest credit repair company, claiming to have operated since 1993 and removed over 35,000 negative entries for clients across all 50 states. The company's core business model focuses on credit restoration and rating correction through disputing negative items reported by credit bureaus. Their primary service offering involves requesting credit reports from the three major bureaus, providing free initial consultations, and disputing late payments, collections, charge-offs, foreclosures, judgments, and liens. Contact USA also offers credit monitoring services that provide clients with three annual credit profile reviews with derogatory items highlighted, plus credit report ordering services and educational resources on credit laws.

What distinguishes Contact USA is their emphasis on longevity and scale—they highlight 33 years of operational history and claim to have helped thousands of clients achieve results in months rather than years. The website includes client testimonials, multiple phone lines (718-743-4040, 212-437-9203, 845-621-4040), and additional contact options via email and text. They provide supplementary tools including loan calculators, debt consolidation calculators, and information on bankruptcy, debt settlement, and debt consolidation, positioning themselves as comprehensive credit solutions advisors.

The company's marketing emphasizes pain points (overwhelming bills, creditor harassment) and promises (peace of mind, job prospects, lower interest rates, savings of $5,000-$30,000 on mortgages). However, the website makes several claims that warrant scrutiny: the claim of being "America's oldest credit repair company" since 1993 is difficult to independently verify, and the promise of removing negative items "in only a few months" is vague and likely depends on individual dispute outcomes, which are not guaranteed under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA).

Contact USA operates in a heavily regulated industry. Credit repair companies cannot legally guarantee removal of accurate negative information, and the FCRA limits the reporting period for most negative items to 7 years (10 for bankruptcy). While the company cites CROA compliance in their menu, the website lacks transparent pricing information, specific success rates, or detailed explanations of what the dispute process entails, which are red flags in an industry with substantial regulatory scrutiny.
pros: Claims 33 years of operational history (since 1993) with experience across all 50 states
Free initial consultation before committing to any paid services
Offers three-times-yearly credit monitoring with derogatory items clearly marked
Provides supplementary financial tools (loan calculators, debt consolidation calculators, mortgage payoff tools)
Multiple contact methods available (three phone numbers, email, text)
Addresses specific negative items: late pays, collections, charge-offs, foreclosures, judgments, and liens
Includes educational resources on credit laws (FCRA, CROA, FDCPA)
cons: No transparent pricing information disclosed on website—clients must call or consult to learn costs
Vague promises of results "in only a few months" without specific timelines, success rates, or individual outcome disclaimers
Does not clearly explain what disputes entail or the FCRA/CROA limitations (accurate negative items cannot be removed)
Claim of being "America's oldest credit repair company" is difficult to verify and not independently corroborated
Website lacks customer complaint disclosures, regulatory warnings, or details about refund policies
best_for: Consumers with multiple negative items (collections, charge-offs, late payments) who want professional dispute assistance
People rebuilding credit after financial hardship who can afford credit repair service fees
Individuals seeking credit monitoring and ongoing oversight to catch new errors on reports
diagnosis: Contact USA is best for consumers with multiple derogatory credit report items who can afford paid credit repair services and want professional dispute assistance. The main caveat is that no credit repair company can legally remove accurate negative information, and results depend on identifying errors or successfully disputing items—the website's claims of rapid remediation should be verified with legal documentation of specific success rates before committing to fees.
services: Credit report requests from three major credit bureaus
Credit restoration and rating correction via disputes
Removal of late payments from credit reports
Removal of foreclosures, liens, and judgments
Credit monitoring with three annual profile reviews
Mortgage calculator and mortgage payoff goal calculator
Educational articles on bankruptcy, debt settlement, and debt consolidation
